boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC uses Bohmian minisuperspace trajectories for quantum cosmological evolution.
boundary_claims.reason: Standard minisuperspace trajectory formulation is well-documented in literature.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC uses the Wheeler-DeWitt toy equation to model wavefunction evolution.
boundary_claims.reason: Wheeler-DeWitt equation is the standard prior art foundation for minisuperspace.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC uses scalar field values as relational clocks to segment trajectories.
boundary_claims.reason: Relational clock checking using scalar fields is widely discussed, but requires human review for implementation specifics.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC computes quantum potential values along trajectories.
boundary_claims.reason: Quantum potential is a core element of Bohmian mechanics prior art.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC implements detection of node proximity to flag potential mathematical failures.
boundary_claims.reason: Node detection is specific to our numerical implementation of trajectory integration.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC segments trajectories locally to handle non-monotonic clock behavior.
boundary_claims.reason: Branch segmentation is workflow/implementation specific, needs confirmation.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC implements a null-model validation scaffold to rule out trivial matching.
boundary_claims.reason: Scaffolding structure is specific to the BMC workflow verification process.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC uses EBP debt gates to track unresolved physical and mathematical assumptions.
boundary_claims.reason: EBP debt tracking is unique to the workflow governance model.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC uses Lean policy contracts to formally prove safety constraints.
boundary_claims.reason: Lean policy proving is unique to the BMC workflow verification pipeline.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC does not claim to recover the classical Friedmann equations from quantum trajectories.
boundary_claims.reason: Classical dynamics recovery is explicitly deferred; no recovery claim is made.

boundary_claims.claim_text: BMC does not claim any scientific novelty or new physics.
boundary_claims.reason: Scientific novelty claims are strictly blocked under current EBP status.

gates.name: no_residual_computation_gate
gates.reason: Confirms that no actual numerical residual was computed.

gates.name: no_null_comparison_result_gate
gates.reason: Confirms that no null model comparison results are computed.

gates.name: no_recovery_claim_gate
gates.reason: Confirms no recovery claim is made.

gates.name: full_bmc_blocked_gate
gates.reason: Confirms the full BMC promotion gate is blocked.

gates.name: faithfulness_contested_gate
gates.reason: Confirms faithfulness review status remains contested.

warnings: This is a BMC-0A prior-art boundary note only.
No scientific novelty claim is made.
Runtime EBP debt labels are not adversarial-review classifications.
